goal:
You are working on a real-world software engineering task from SWE-Skills-Bench.

The task description, target files, requirements, and acceptance criteria are stored at /workspace/TASK.md inside your Docker workspace. Read it first with read_file_real.

The source tree is available at: /workspace/QuantLib

Inspect the repository with shell_exec_in_workspace and read_file_real. Make changes with apply_patch when possible, or write_file_real when replacing a whole file. Use absolute paths for file tools.

After you finish, respond with TASK_COMPLETE.

--- TASK BRIEF (excerpt) ---
# Task: Create QuantLib Usage Examples with DCF Valuation

## Background
   Add practical examples to the
   QuantLib repository demonstrating discounted cash flow (DCF) valuation
   using QuantLib's existing API.

## Files to Create/Modify
   - Examples/DCFValuation/DCFDemo.cpp (main example)
   - Examples/DCFValuation/CMakeLists.txt (build config)
   - Examples/DCFValuation/README.md (documentation)

## Requirements
   
   DCF Valuation Demo (DCFDemo.cpp):
   - Using QuantLib's YieldTermStructure for discount rates
   - Creating cash flow schedules with QuantLib::Schedule
   - Present value calculation using QuantLib::CashFlows::npv
   - Terminal value modeling
   
   Components to Demonstrate:
   - FlatForward term structure setup
   - FixedRateCoupon for regular cash flows
   - Simple bond-like cash flow structure
   - Sensitivity analysis (parallel shift in rates)
   
   Example Output:
   - NPV of cash flow stream
   - Individual discounted cash flows
   - Duration and convexity metrics

4. Build Integration:
   - CMakeLists.txt links against QuantLib
   - Can be built standalone after QuantLib is installed
   - Cross-platform (Windows, Linux, macOS)

## Acceptance Criteria
   - Example compiles and links against installed QuantLib
   - Output shows correct NPV calculations
   - README explains financial concepts and code structure
--- END BRIEF ---

function.name: read_file_real
function.description: Read a file from the live Docker workspace. Read /workspace/TASK.md first.

function.name: write_file_real
function.description: Write or overwrite a file in the live Docker workspace. Use absolute paths rooted at /workspace.

function.name: shell_exec_in_workspace
function.description: Run a shell command in the live Docker workspace and return stdout plus stderr.

function.name: apply_patch
function.description: Apply a unified diff to the repository in the Docker workspace using patch -p1 from /workspace.

workspace.setup_command: if [ -d /workspace/QuantLib/.git ]; then cd /workspace/QuantLib && git checkout HEAD -- . && git clean -fd; fi

files./workspace/TASK.md:
